modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues updating users in TeamDynamix group from Excel file.

full_description_text:  
A field technician attempted to remove and update users in a TeamDynamix group using an Excel file. The process did not go as planned, leading to complications in the user management. There were issues with the file format and data recognition, which caused delays in the updates.
short_description: Issues updating users in TeamDynamix group from Excel file.
description: A field technician attempted to remove and update users in a TeamDynamix group using an Excel file. The process did not go as planned, leading to complications in the user management. There were issues with the file format and data recognition, which caused delays in the updates.
